stamp_rationale: Test validation was performed live during implementation — portfolio hit-rate table in changes.md is the empirical test record. Path-containment tested end-to-end against escape attempts. Lenses verified to produce consistent output on 5 representative projects across the portfolio.

verdicts.reason: All three scripts executed end-to-end against naval-scribe/index.html with expected hit rates (ux: 1 warning, mobile: 2 warnings, cult: 2 warnings). The portfolio hit-rates table in changes.md confirms consistent behavior across 5 projects. No runtime errors observed.
verdicts.evidence: experiments/infra-yolo-evals/changes.md portfolio-hit-rates table; end-to-end runs documented in COUNCIL_ESCALATION.md resolution blocks

verdicts.reason: Path-traversal test cases passed: /etc/passwd rejected with clear ERROR message, ../../etc/passwd canonicalized to /home/etc/passwd and rejected, symlink escapes resolved via os.path.realpath. Legit paths inside the repo (naval-scribe/index.html) work as expected.
verdicts.evidence: Test transcript in infra-yolo-evals/COUNCIL_ESCALATION.md resolution (commit 10bd394 rationale)

verdicts.reason: CLI output on successful runs: clean [WARN] lines followed by WARNINGS: N or PASS. On rejection: clear ERROR line followed by exit 1. --help prints full documentation without running checks.
verdicts.evidence: Live transcripts from 5-project portfolio run in changes.md

verdicts.reason: README.md + docstrings + --help form a coherent discovery path for humans and AI agents. Regex patterns documented verbatim.

5/5 projects produced actionable warnings. focus-ring warning on all 5 confirms a real recurring antipattern in YOLO single-file HTML. table-overflow correctly caught naval-scribe regression that manual review missed. cult_status graded markdown-deck (the flagship) as PASS and graded thinner tools as WARNINGS — matching subjective intuition.
verdicts.evidence: Portfolio hit-rates table: cron-explain (1+2+2), url-dissect (1+2+1), uuid-inspector (1+2+2), naval-scribe (1+2+2), markdown-deck (1+2+PASS)

verdicts.reason: Internal infrastructure exempt from signature-move bar per standing override.

Testing followed the dark-factory pattern: run all three lenses, observe warnings, confirm advisory mode doesn't break downstream. Path-containment testing mapped directly to the learnings.md:30 rule being enforced. No lessons violated.
verdicts.evidence: learnings.md:30 (Internal verifier path containment); testing observed in commit 10bd394
